arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Nottingham Forest – Match Preview and Team News
arts.sum: Arsenal host Nottingham Forest this weekend as they search for their first Premier League win since the start of October. The Gunners and Forest both have identical league records but Mikel Arteta’s side are one position ahead in fourth due to having a superior goal difference. Nottingham Forest have been the surprise package in the […] The post Arsenal vs Nottingham Forest – Match Preview and Team News first appeared on The Football Faithful.

Liverpool insisting on £50m-rated ace in January swoop but Arsenal will have a say
arts.sum: Liverpool will try their hardest in January to convince Real Sociedad and Spain midfielder, Martin Zubimendi, to sign for them, but they face stiff competition from Premier League rivals, Arsenal, particularly given the Spanish connection in North London. arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola makes new relegation promise as Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham receive fresh deadline
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has promised to stick with the Premier League champions even if they are relegated out of the top flight to the National League. City currently finds themselves embroiled in a battle with the Premier League over alleged historical breaches of Financial Fair Play (FFP) rules.

arts.sum: Arsenal and Mikel Arteta are looking to snap a winless run of four Premier League games this weekend - but face a buoyant Nottingham Forest side who are looking to impose more misery

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Nottingham Forest score predicted as epic Premier League clash takes place
arts.sum: Arsenal face a tough test in the Premier League when they return from the international break, with the Gunners welcoming Nottingham Forest to the Emirates Stadium later today. We predict that Arsenal could set up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their line-up as follows: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Calafiori; Partey, Odegaard, Rice; Saka, Havertz, Martinelli.
